name: Teen Jesus and the Jean Teasers
description: '''Teen Jesus and the Jean Teasers''' are an Australian [[Rock music|rock]] band formed in [[Canberra]] in 2015. The group consists of vocalist Anna Ryan, guitarist Scarlett McKahey, drummer Neve van Boxsel, and bassist Jaida Stephenson. Their debut [[extended play]], ''[[Pretty Good for a Girl Band]]'', was released in 2022 through [[Domestic La La]] and won Best Independent Punk Album or EP at the [[AIR Awards of 2023|2023 AIR Awards]]. Their debut full-length album, ''[[I Love You (Teen Jesus and the Jean Teasers album)|I Love You]]'', was released in 2023 and peaked at number 6 on the [[ARIA Charts|ARIA Albums Chart]]. Their most recent album, ''[[Glory (Teen Jesus and the Jean Teasers album)|Glory]]'', was released in November 2025.
